announcementBanner.message: SimplifiedPDF is in early development. We're shipping new features weekly!
announcementBanner.detailsStrong: This is a new tool with limited use cases right now.
announcementBanner.detailsBody: We're actively working on expanding features and capabilities. Your feedback helps us prioritize what matters most.

hero.description: Edit PDFs, add text, and sign documents right in your browser. No signup. No subscription. No files sent to our servers. Just download and go.
hero.cta: Edit a PDF Now — No Account Needed
hero.subtext: Works on any device. Your documents never leave your browser.
hero.badge4: Your Files Stay On Your Device

whyWeExist.title: Why We Exist
whyWeExist.problem: Most "free" PDF editors are free to edit, not free to download!
whyWeExist.detail: You upload your document, spend five minutes editing it, click download — and hit a paywall. Some charge £10/month. Some lock you in with a trial you forgot to cancel. Some quietly upload your sensitive documents to their servers.
whyWeExist.solution: SimplifiedPDF is different. Everything runs in your browser. Your files are never uploaded anywhere. Editing is free. Downloading is free. Always.
whyWeExist.note: You NEVER need an account (unless you want advanced features and file sharing) and you don't need to pay for simple things like adding text or signatures

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Three steps. No account. No waiting.
howItWorks.step1Desc1: Drop your PDF into the editor.
howItWorks.step1Desc2: It opens instantly in your browser.
howItWorks.step1Desc3: Nothing is sent to any server.
howItWorks.step2Desc1: Add text anywhere on the page.
howItWorks.step2Desc3: Drag, resize, and position everything exactly where you need it.
howItWorks.step3Desc1: Click download and your edited PDF
howItWorks.step3Desc3: That's it. No paywall. No watermark. No signup prompt.

features.label: What You Can Do
features.title: Everything you need for everyday PDF editing.
features.feature1Desc: Click anywhere on a PDF page and start typing. Choose your font, size, and colour. Perfect for filling in forms, adding names, dates, or addresses.
features.feature2Desc: Draw your signature with your mouse or finger. Save it for reuse across documents. Add, move, resize, or remove signatures at any time.
features.feature3Desc: All your edited PDFs are stored locally in your browser — like a private drive on your own device. Access, re-edit, or delete them anytime.
features.feature4Desc: Load the editor once and it works without an internet connection. Your documents and signatures are always available, even on a plane.
features.feature5Desc: Your documents never leave your device. No cloud storage. No third-party access. No risk. What you edit is only ever seen by you.
features.feature6Desc: When you're done editing, just click download. No account prompt. No "upgrade to export". No watermark on your files. Free means free.

privacy.label: Privacy By Design
privacy.title: Your documents are none of our business.
privacy.para1: When you open a sensitive contract, a medical form, or a legal document in most PDF editors, you're uploading it to a stranger's server. You're trusting their security. Their staff. Their privacy policy buried in 8,000 words of legal text.
privacy.para2: SimplifiedPDF works differently. All processing happens inside your own browser, on your own device. When you edit a PDF, the file never moves. It doesn't touch our servers because it never gets sent to them in the first place.
privacy.para3: No account means no data to breach. No uploads mean no exposure. Simple.

comparison.label: Why We Exist
comparison.title: Why most "free" PDF editors aren't actually free
comparison.note: We built SimplifiedPDF because we got tired of the same bait-and-switch. You search for "free PDF editor", you find one, you do the work, you click download — and suddenly it's $12 a month. That's not free. That's a demo with extra steps. SimplifiedPDF will always let you download your files for free.
comparison.compareLink: See full comparison vs. Adobe Acrobat →

useCases.title: Built for everyday document tasks
useCases.case4: Adding your name and address to PDFs

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.faq_a1: Yes. Editing PDFs, adding text, drawing signatures, and downloading your finished documents are all completely free. No trial period, no credit card required, no subscription. We mean it.
faq.faq_q2: Do I need to create an account?
faq.faq_a2: No. You can start editing a PDF right now without signing up for anything. An optional account may be added in the future for features like syncing documents across devices, but the core editor will always be free and always require no account.
faq.faq_q3: Are my documents uploaded to your servers?
faq.faq_a3: No. Everything runs inside your browser on your own device. Your PDF files are never sent to our servers. We don't see them, store them, or have any access to them. Not even temporarily.
faq.faq_q4: Is there a watermark on downloaded files?
faq.faq_a4: No. Your downloaded PDF is clean. No watermarks, no branding added to your documents.
faq.faq_q5: What can I do with SimplifiedPDF?
faq.faq_a5: You can add text anywhere on a PDF page, draw and save signatures, place signatures on documents, manage your edited documents locally, and download the finished PDF. More features will be added over time.
faq.faq_a6: Yes. Once you've loaded SimplifiedPDF in your browser, it works without an internet connection. Your documents and signatures are stored locally on your device.
faq.faq_q7: What happens to my documents if I clear my browser data?
faq.faq_a7: Your documents are stored in your browser's local storage. If you clear your browser data, those files will be removed. We recommend downloading any important documents to your device after editing.
faq.faq_a8: Yes. SimplifiedPDF works in any modern mobile browser on iOS and Android. You can even install it to your home screen for quick access.
faq.faq_q9: How does SimplifiedPDF make money if it's free?
faq.faq_a9: SimplifiedPDF is sustained by optional donations from users who find it useful and want to support it. That's it. Donors get an ad-free experience. There are no hidden revenue streams that compromise your privacy or your downloads.
faq.faq_q10: Can I use SimplifiedPDF instead of Adobe Acrobat?
faq.faq_a10: Yes, for most everyday tasks. SimplifiedPDF lets you add text, fill forms, draw signatures, and download your edited PDF for free — all without a subscription or software install. Adobe Acrobat Pro offers more advanced features like OCR and PDF creation from scratch, but for signing and editing existing PDFs, SimplifiedPDF covers the essentials at no cost.
faq.faq_q11: Can I edit a PDF form with SimplifiedPDF?
faq.faq_a11: Yes. SimplifiedPDF lets you click on any part of a PDF and add text, making it ideal for filling in forms, applications, and official documents. Just open your PDF, click the field you want to fill, type your answer, and download.
faq.faq_q12: Does SimplifiedPDF work on iPhone and Android?
faq.faq_a12: Yes. SimplifiedPDF runs in any modern mobile browser, including Safari on iPhone and Chrome on Android. You can add text and sign PDFs directly from your phone. You can also install it to your home screen for quick access, just like an app.
faq.faq_q13: Is SimplifiedPDF legal for signing contracts?
faq.faq_a13: Electronic signatures created in SimplifiedPDF are a form of e-signature, which is legally recognised in most countries under laws like the US ESIGN Act and the EU eIDAS Regulation for standard business agreements, rental contracts, NDAs, and similar documents. For high-stakes legal matters or regulated industries that require qualified electronic signatures, consult a legal professional about your specific requirements.

finalCta.subtext: No account. No subscription. No nonsense.
finalCta.note: Your documents never leave your browser.

footer.tagline: The free PDF editor with no catch. Built by developers who got tired of PDF paywalls.
footer.copyright: © 2025 SimplifiedPDF · Made with ☕ · No documents harmed in the making of this editor

signPdf.heroHeadline: Sign PDF Online — Free, Private, No Signup
signPdf.heroDescription: Draw your signature, place it anywhere on your PDF, and download the signed document instantly. No account, no subscription, no files sent to any server.
signPdf.heroNote: Your documents never leave your browser.
signPdf.howItWorksTitle: Three steps. No account. No waiting.
signPdf.step1Desc1: Drop your PDF into the editor.
signPdf.step1Desc2: It opens instantly in your browser.
signPdf.step1Desc3: Nothing is sent to any server.
signPdf.step2Desc1: Use your mouse, trackpad, or finger.
signPdf.step2Desc2: Save it for reuse on future documents.
signPdf.step2Desc3: Drag and resize to position it perfectly.
signPdf.step3Desc2: No watermark. No paywall. No account prompt.
signPdf.step3Desc3: Your signed PDF saves to your device.
signPdf.whyTitle: The PDF signer that doesn't compromise your privacy
signPdf.diff1Desc: Sign PDFs without creating a profile or handing over an email address. Just open and sign.
signPdf.diff2Desc: Your PDF is never uploaded to our servers. Everything runs inside your browser — private by design.
signPdf.diff3Desc: Your signed PDF is clean. No branding, no "signed with SimplifiedPDF" footer. It looks exactly as you intended.
signPdf.diff4Desc: Once loaded, the editor works without internet. Sign documents even on a plane or with a slow connection.
signPdf.uc1Desc: Sign tenancy agreements and lease renewals without printing.
signPdf.uc2Desc: Return signed employment contracts and NDAs instantly.
signPdf.uc3Desc: Fill and sign onboarding paperwork from any device.
signPdf.uc4Desc: Permission slips, enrolment forms, and consent letters.
signPdf.faq_a1: Yes. Electronic signatures are legally recognised in most countries for everyday documents — including contracts, rental agreements, NDAs, and HR forms — under laws like the US ESIGN Act and EU eIDAS Regulation.
signPdf.faq_q2: Do I need to print and scan to sign a PDF?
signPdf.faq_a2: No. With SimplifiedPDF you can draw your signature directly on the document using your mouse or finger and download the signed version instantly. No printing required.
signPdf.faq_q3: Can I sign a PDF on my phone?
signPdf.faq_a3: Yes. SimplifiedPDF works in any modern mobile browser on iOS and Android. You can draw your signature with your finger and download the signed PDF in seconds.
signPdf.faq_a4: Your signature is saved locally in your browser on your own device only. It is never sent to our servers. You can reuse it across multiple documents.
signPdf.faq_q5: Can I sign multiple pages in one PDF?
signPdf.faq_a5: Yes. You can navigate to any page in the PDF and place your signature exactly where you need it, as many times as needed.
signPdf.faq_q6: Does SimplifiedPDF work without the internet?
signPdf.faq_a6: Yes. Once you have loaded the editor in your browser, it works offline. Your documents and signature are stored on your device.
signPdf.finalCtaSubtext: No account. No subscription. No nonsense.
signPdf.finalCtaNote: Your documents never leave your browser.

editPdf.heroHeadline: Edit PDF Free Online — Add Text, Fill Forms, No Signup
editPdf.heroDescription: Add text to any PDF, fill in forms, draw signatures — all in your browser. Download instantly, no watermark, no account required.
editPdf.heroNote: Your documents never leave your browser.
editPdf.featuresTitle: Everything you need to edit a PDF
editPdf.feat1Desc: Click anywhere on the PDF and start typing. Choose font, size, and colour to match the document.
editPdf.feat2Desc: Type into any form field — text boxes, date fields, signature lines. No special software needed.
editPdf.feat3Desc: Sign with your mouse or finger. Save your signature for reuse across documents.
editPdf.privacyCalloutTitle: Unlike Smallpdf or ILovePDF, your PDF never touches our servers
editPdf.privacyCalloutDesc: Most online PDF editors upload your file to their servers to process it. SimplifiedPDF runs entirely in your browser — your document is never transmitted, stored, or seen by anyone but you.
editPdf.howItWorksTitle: Three steps. No account. No waiting.
editPdf.step1Desc1: Drop your PDF into the editor.
editPdf.step2Title: Step 2: Add Text or Fill Fields
editPdf.step3Desc3: Your edited PDF saves to your device.
editPdf.uc1Desc: Fill in employment forms without printing.
editPdf.uc2Desc: Complete self-assessment and tax documents digitally.
editPdf.uc3Desc: Patient intake and consent forms filled in seconds.
editPdf.uc4Desc: Annotate, fill, and return coursework PDFs.
editPdf.faq_q1: Can I add text to a PDF without Adobe Acrobat?
editPdf.faq_a1: Yes. SimplifiedPDF lets you add text to any PDF right in your browser — no software download, no Adobe subscription required. Just open the PDF, click where you want to type, and start editing.
editPdf.faq_q2: Can I fill in a PDF form online?
editPdf.faq_a2: Yes. Open your form in SimplifiedPDF, click on any field, and type your answer. You can fill in text fields, dates, names, and any other area of the PDF. Download the completed form when you're done.
editPdf.faq_q3: Will there be a watermark on my edited PDF?
editPdf.faq_a3: No. SimplifiedPDF never adds watermarks to your downloaded files. The PDF you download looks exactly as you edited it.
editPdf.faq_q4: Is my PDF uploaded to your servers?
editPdf.faq_a4: No. Everything runs inside your browser on your own device. Your PDF files are never sent to our servers. We don't see them, store them, or have any access to them.
editPdf.faq_q5: Can I change the font size or colour when adding text?
editPdf.faq_a5: Yes. When you add text to a PDF in SimplifiedPDF, you can choose the font, size, and colour to match the rest of the document.
editPdf.faq_q6: Does editing a PDF work on mobile?
editPdf.faq_a6: Yes. SimplifiedPDF works in any modern mobile browser on iOS and Android. You can add text, fill forms, and download your edited PDF from your phone.
editPdf.finalCtaSubtext: No account. No subscription. No nonsense.
editPdf.finalCtaNote: Your documents never leave your browser.

adobeAcrobat.heroDescription: Edit PDFs, add text, fill forms, and sign documents — all in your browser, completely free. No subscription. No Adobe ID. No files uploaded to the cloud.
adobeAcrobat.heroPriceNote: Adobe Acrobat Pro costs $22.99/month. SimplifiedPDF costs nothing.
adobeAcrobat.heroNote: No signup. Your files stay on your device.
adobeAcrobat.weWinTitle: What SimplifiedPDF does that Adobe charges for
adobeAcrobat.win1Desc: Adobe charges $22.99/month for Acrobat Pro. SimplifiedPDF covers the most common tasks — add text, sign, fill forms — at no cost, with no trial period.
adobeAcrobat.win2Title: Your files never leave your device
adobeAcrobat.win2Desc: Adobe uploads files to its cloud to process them. SimplifiedPDF runs entirely in your browser — your PDF is never transmitted to any server.
adobeAcrobat.win3Desc: Adobe requires you to create an account before you can do anything. SimplifiedPDF lets you open and edit a PDF in seconds with no signup.
adobeAcrobat.win4Desc: Acrobat requires a desktop app or browser extension. SimplifiedPDF runs in any modern browser with no installation.
adobeAcrobat.theyWinTitle: What Adobe does that we don't (yet)
adobeAcrobat.theyWinDesc: We believe in honesty. Here are the things Adobe Acrobat can do that SimplifiedPDF currently cannot.
adobeAcrobat.theyWinNote: If these features are critical for you, Adobe Acrobat Pro may be the better fit. For everyday PDF editing, signing, and form-filling, SimplifiedPDF is a strong free alternative.
adobeAcrobat.limit1Title: Create PDFs from other file types
adobeAcrobat.limit1Desc: Adobe can convert Word, Excel, and image files into PDF. SimplifiedPDF currently only edits existing PDFs.
adobeAcrobat.limit2Desc: Acrobat's OCR technology can recognise text in scanned documents. SimplifiedPDF does not currently offer this.
adobeAcrobat.limit3Title: PDF compression and file size reduction
adobeAcrobat.limit3Desc: Adobe can significantly compress PDFs for sending. SimplifiedPDF does not currently offer compression.
adobeAcrobat.limit4Desc: Adobe Pro offers document redaction and encryption. SimplifiedPDF is focused on basic editing and signing.
adobeAcrobat.faq_a1: For most everyday tasks — adding text, filling forms, signing documents — yes. SimplifiedPDF handles these for free, with no subscription and no software. If you need advanced features like OCR, PDF creation from other file types, or professional redaction, Adobe Acrobat remains the more complete tool.
adobeAcrobat.faq_q2: Is SimplifiedPDF really free, or does it have a free tier like Adobe?
adobeAcrobat.faq_a2: Completely free. There's no free tier that limits downloads or adds watermarks. The core features — add text, sign, fill forms, download — are free forever with no strings attached.
adobeAcrobat.faq_q3: Does SimplifiedPDF upload my PDFs to a server like Adobe does?
adobeAcrobat.faq_a3: No. SimplifiedPDF runs entirely inside your browser. Your PDF files are processed locally on your device and are never sent to our servers. Adobe Acrobat, by contrast, uploads files to Adobe's cloud infrastructure.
adobeAcrobat.faq_q4: Can I sign a PDF for free with SimplifiedPDF?
adobeAcrobat.faq_a4: Yes. Draw your signature, place it on the document, and download the signed PDF — all for free. Adobe's e-signing features require an Acrobat subscription or a separate Adobe Sign plan.
adobeAcrobat.faq_q5: Does SimplifiedPDF work on Mac and Windows?
adobeAcrobat.faq_a5: Yes. Because it runs in your browser, SimplifiedPDF works on any operating system — Mac, Windows, Linux, iOS, or Android.
adobeAcrobat.finalCtaSubtext: SimplifiedPDF handles everyday PDF editing — free, private, no account.
adobeAcrobat.finalCtaNote: Your documents never leave your browser.

smallpdf.heroHeadline: The Free Smallpdf Alternative — No Upload, No Watermark
smallpdf.heroDescription: SimplifiedPDF never uploads your files, never adds watermarks, and has no daily limits. Edit PDFs completely free, right in your browser.
smallpdf.heroPriceNote: Where Smallpdf uploads your files and limits free usage, SimplifiedPDF is unlimited and private by design.
smallpdf.heroNote: No signup. No upload. No watermark.
smallpdf.p1Desc: Your PDF is sent to Smallpdf's servers every time
smallpdf.p2Desc: Free downloads include "Processed by Smallpdf" branding
smallpdf.p3Desc: Free tier blocks you after 2 tasks — then demands an upgrade
smallpdf.weWinTitle: Where SimplifiedPDF wins on every point
smallpdf.win1Desc: Smallpdf uploads every PDF to their servers for processing — even on the free tier. SimplifiedPDF runs entirely in your browser. Your document is never transmitted anywhere.
smallpdf.win2Desc: Smallpdf adds a watermark to free-tier downloads. Every PDF you download from SimplifiedPDF is clean — no branding, no watermark, no matter what.
smallpdf.win3Desc: Smallpdf's free tier limits you to 2 tasks per day. SimplifiedPDF has no limits. Edit as many PDFs as you like, whenever you like.
smallpdf.win4Desc: Because Smallpdf relies on server-side processing, it requires a constant internet connection. SimplifiedPDF works offline once loaded — even on a plane.
smallpdf.theyWinTitle: What Smallpdf does that we don't (yet)
smallpdf.theyWinDesc: Smallpdf has a broader toolset. Here's what we don't support yet.
smallpdf.theyWinNote: If file conversion or compression are your primary need, Smallpdf Pro may suit you. For signing, adding text, and filling forms — SimplifiedPDF does it better, for free.
smallpdf.limit1Desc: Smallpdf can significantly reduce PDF file sizes. SimplifiedPDF does not currently offer PDF compression.
smallpdf.limit2Title: PDF to Word, Excel, or image
smallpdf.limit2Desc: Smallpdf can convert PDFs to other formats. SimplifiedPDF currently only supports editing existing PDFs.
smallpdf.limit3Desc: Smallpdf offers tools to merge multiple PDFs into one or split a PDF into separate files. This is not currently available in SimplifiedPDF.
smallpdf.faq_q1: Why is SimplifiedPDF better than Smallpdf for privacy?
smallpdf.faq_a1: Smallpdf uploads your PDF to its servers to perform any operation — including basic tasks like adding text. SimplifiedPDF processes everything locally in your browser. Your PDF is never transmitted, which is essential for sensitive documents like contracts, medical forms, or financial records.
smallpdf.faq_q2: Does SimplifiedPDF have a daily limit like Smallpdf?
smallpdf.faq_a2: No. Smallpdf's free tier allows only 2 tasks per day before requiring an upgrade. SimplifiedPDF has no daily limits, no task caps, and no usage restrictions.
smallpdf.faq_q3: Will my downloaded PDF have a watermark?
smallpdf.faq_a3: No. SimplifiedPDF never adds watermarks to your files. Smallpdf adds 'Processed by Smallpdf' watermarks on free-tier downloads. With SimplifiedPDF, what you edit is exactly what you download.
smallpdf.faq_q4: Does SimplifiedPDF work without the internet?
smallpdf.faq_a4: Yes. Because SimplifiedPDF runs in your browser rather than on servers, it works offline once loaded. Smallpdf requires an internet connection for every operation since files must be sent to and from their servers.
smallpdf.faq_q5: Is SimplifiedPDF free to use without a Smallpdf account?
smallpdf.faq_a5: Yes. SimplifiedPDF never requires an account. You can open a PDF, add text, sign it, and download it without creating a profile or providing an email address.
smallpdf.finalCtaSubtext: No upload. No watermark. No daily cap. Just free PDF editing.
smallpdf.finalCtaNote: Your documents never leave your browser.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.shortVersionBefore: SimplifiedPDF is built on a simple principle:
privacy.shortVersionAfter: Nothing you edit in SimplifiedPDF is ever uploaded to our servers, stored on our systems, or seen by us. Everything runs inside your browser, on your own device.
privacy.filesP1: When you open a PDF in SimplifiedPDF, the file is loaded directly into your browser using the Web File API. No bytes of that file are transmitted to any server — ours or anyone else's.
privacy.filesP2: When you add text, draw a signature, or make any other edit, those changes are applied locally using PDF.js and related browser-based libraries. Again: no server involved.
privacy.filesP3: When you click download, your edited PDF is generated in your browser and saved directly to your device — just like saving any other file. Nothing is routed through our infrastructure.
privacy.filesP4: Your documents, signatures, and saved files are stored in your browser's local storage (IndexedDB). They are only accessible from the device and browser you used. They are not synced to any cloud. Clearing your browser data will remove them.
privacy.collectIntro: SimplifiedPDF collects minimal, non-personal data to keep the service running and understand basic usage patterns:
privacy.collectItem1Desc: — page views, rough geographic region (country-level), browser type, and device category. This data is aggregated and contains no personally identifiable information.
privacy.collectItem2Desc: — if the editor encounters a technical error, we may log anonymised error information (no file content) to help fix bugs.
privacy.collectItem3Desc: — if you choose to make a donation, payment is handled by our payment processor (Stripe). We do not store your card details. We receive a record of the transaction amount and a non-reversible transaction ID.
privacy.collectOutro: We do not collect names, email addresses, or account information from users of the free editor. We do not sell any data to third parties.
privacy.cookiesText: SimplifiedPDF uses no advertising cookies and no cross-site tracking cookies. We may use a minimal session cookie if you create an optional account, purely to keep you signed in. Analytics data is collected without cookies where possible.
privacy.thirdParty1Desc: — SimplifiedPDF is hosted on Vercel. Vercel receives standard web server logs (IP address, request path, timestamp) for infrastructure purposes. See Vercel's privacy policy for details.
privacy.thirdParty2Desc: — optional donations are processed by Stripe. Your payment data is governed by Stripe's privacy policy.
privacy.rightsText: Because we hold virtually no personal data about you, there is very little to request, correct, or delete. But if you have any questions or concerns about data we might hold, contact us at:
privacy.changesText: We may update this policy occasionally. The date at the top of this page will always reflect when it was last changed. We will never make changes that compromise the core privacy principle: your files are yours and they never leave your device.
